title: UT Southwestern - Staining Melanoma Cells for Flow Cytometry
steps: Adjust staining volume and antibody concentration to the number of cells. Concentrations listed are for 5x10 6 cells in a 50ml reaction. Do not exceed 10 6 cells/10ml. - mLin APC: Ter119 (1/100), CD31(1/100), CD45(1/200) - HLA FITC: HLA-ABC (1/5)
Add antibodies to tube and incubate covered on ice for 00:20:00
Wash 1x with 1 mL staining medium and spin down 220 rpm, 4 °C, 4 minutes . Aspirate supernatant
DAPI staining: resuspend samples in DAPI 1:2000 to gate out dead cells. Stock in made in water (1mg/ml)

Adjust final sample volume to run at 6000 events/sec at maximum and then run. If clogging becomes an issue, then filter through cut pieces of filter %s %s Xenograft stain (50ml volume) 1x 5x %s %s Xenograft stain (50ml volume) 1x 5x
creator: Shree Bose
